originalTitle: SpaceX stock market debut set to make Elon Musk a trillionaire
summary: SpaceX plans to raise up to $75bn (£56bn) when it goes public this month – putting Elon Musk on course to become the world's first trillionaire. The space company is gearing up for what is expected to be the largest-ever stock market debut. It says it will sell 555.6 million shares at $135 (£100) a piece in its initial public offering (IPO).
content:
SpaceX plans to raise up to $75bn (£56bn) when it goes public this month – putting Elon Musk on course to become the world's first trillionaire.

The space company is gearing up for what is expected to be the largest-ever stock market debut.

It says it will sell 555.6 million shares at $135 (£100) a piece in its initial public offering (IPO).

The estimated proceeds would easily top the $26bn raised by oil giant Saudi Aramco in 2019.

What's more, the offering would give SpaceX a market value of $1.77trn (£1.53tn). Only six companies in the S&P 500 are currently worth more, the largest being Nvidia at $5.2tn .

The IPO document details plans to use money from the sale of stock to help put people on the Moon again – and perhaps even Mars.

In one section, it talks of a need to build "a permanent human colony" on the red planet with "at least one million inhabitants".

But even as SpaceX shoots for both the stock market (and literal) moon, the company is currently losing billions of dollars a year.

Read more: How Musk is boosting the British right

The filing shows that the company lost $2.6bn from operations last year – and the losses kept piling up at the start of this year too.

As CEO (and chief technical officer and chairman), Mr Musk's considerable personal wealth is set to be boosted by the IPO.

Forbes currently values his net worth at $826bn, with the stock market move estimated to take that number past the trillion-dollar mark.
chineseTitle: SpaceX 首次上市将使埃隆·马斯克 成为万亿富翁
chineseSummary: SpaceX 计划在本月上市时筹集高达 750 亿美元（560 亿英镑）的资金，使埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 有望成为世界上第一位万亿富翁。这家航天公司正在为预计将是有史以来规模最大的股市首次亮相做准备。该公司表示，将在首次公开募股 (IPO) 中以每股 135 美元（100 英镑）的价格出售 5.556 亿股股票。
chineseContent:
SpaceX 计划在本月上市时筹集高达 750 亿美元（560 亿英镑）的资金，使埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 有望成为世界上第一位万亿富翁。

这家航天公司正在为预计将是有史以来规模最大的股市首次亮相做准备。

该公司表示，将在首次公开募股 (IPO) 中以每股 135 美元（100 英镑）的价格出售 5.556 亿股股票。

估计收益将轻松超过石油巨头沙特阿美公司 2019 年筹集的 260 亿美元。

更重要的是，此次发行将使 SpaceX 的市值达到 1.77 万亿美元（1.53 万亿英镑）。目前，标准普尔 500 指数中只有 6 家公司的市值高于此，其中最大的是 Nvidia，市值为 5.2 兆美元。

IPO 文件详细介绍了利用股票出售所得资金帮助人们再次登上月球——甚至可能登陆火星的计划。

在其中一个章节中，它谈到需要在这颗红色星球上建立一个拥有“至少一百万居民”的“永久人类殖民地”。

但即使 SpaceX 力争股市（和字面上的）月亮，该公司目前每年仍亏损数十亿美元。

阅读更多：马斯克如何推动英国右翼

文件显示，该公司去年运营损失了 26 亿美元，而且今年年初的损失也在不断增加。

作为首席执行官（兼首席技术官和董事长），马斯克先生的可观个人财富将因首次公开募股而增加。

《福布斯》目前对他的净资产估值为 8,260 亿美元，预计股市走势将使该数字突破万亿美元大关。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
